privileged_info_summary: The task uses Microsoft Word 2010 (environment ID: microsoft_word_starter_env@0.1) to format a document containing a US Census Bureau press release (CB24-SFS.17, September 10, 2024) about income and poverty statistics. The document is synthetic, created from real Census data but with some demographic income figures modified (non-Hispanic White household income stated as $86,370 vs. official Census value of $89,050; Hispanic household income stated as $62,590 vs. official Census value of $65,540). The document currently has all text in Normal (plain) style across 35 paragraphs. Key verified statistics include: median household income of $80,610 in 2023, official poverty rate of 11.1% (36.8 million people), Supplemental Poverty Measure of 12.9%, and uninsured rate of 7.9% (26.4 million people). The document title is 'U.S. Census Bureau News' and contains six section headers: Overview, Income, Poverty, Supplemental Poverty Measure, Health Insurance Coverage, and Contact Information. All data is sourced from the official US Census Bureau (https://www.census.gov/).
